buyerFee(uint256).notice: Returns the participation fee for a given auction (scales with bidder count).

createAuction(string,uint256,uint256,uin.notice: Create a new auction. Caller must be a verified seller.

endAuction(uint256).notice: Finalise an auction after the block deadline has passed.

extendBySeller(uint256,uint256).notice: Seller can manually extend within the 20 % cap.

getAuction(uint256).notice: Full auction data for the frontend.

isVerifiedSeller(address).notice: Convenience view used by the frontend.

minimumBidTotal(uint256).notice: Minimum total ETH (fee + bid) required to beat the current highest bid.

placeBid(uint256).notice: Place a bid. msg.value must cover the participation fee + bid amount.

registerAsSeller().notice: Pay the registration fee to become a seller candidate.

withdrawBid(uint256).notice: Withdraw a pending return (outbid amount or seller proceeds).
